name: aiad
description: On-demand augmentation skills for human-first development: the human is the engine that writes the code and the AI augments it when invoked (ia-in-the-loop). Covers design advice and option exploration, rubber duck, didactic code review and refactor/perf (comprehensive per-layer checklist for backend/API/frontend, merge-readiness mode against a base branch, evidence-backed findings ordered by criticality, per-finding test gaps, and a standalone HTML report with the referenced code lines and recommended before/after changes), test generation (TDD, unit, e2e), pairing, unblocking when you are stuck, an authorship journal, and the user-story <-> OpenSpec change bridge to switch between AIAD and SDD. Complements AIDD/SDD without modifying them.
